title: The existence of immunity under public international law is not conclusive as to whether immunity has been removed by the 1978 Act

evidence.clean_text: The Act did not, however, merely seek to frame immunity in terms of this binary distinction, choosing instead to formulate the exceptions to immunity in a series of detailed sections, such that the existence of immunity under public international law is not conclusive as to whether immunity has been removed by the 1978 Act.
